calendar.matters:
Mo For Assignment Order & For Order Restraining Judgt Debtor
Off Calendar Nov-14-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff's Motion For Assignment Order and For Order Restraining Judgment Debtor is granted. No opposition has been filed. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Feb-03-2005 Denied

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-27-2004 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Dec-02-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/ R. Edwards, CSR: Tony Vaughn.
Douglas Holloway, Esq. for Plaintiff: Trinity Capital Corporation, whose presence was waived by means of a declaration.

After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defendant: Mark Edmonds as follows:
Principal $17,190.33
Interest $1,178.42
Attorney's Fees $2,500.00
Costs $346.34 for a total of $21,215.09

Judgment signed in open court.
